flashcards.back: Probability Mass Function - describes probabilities for discrete random variables.

flashcards.front: Key difference between PMF and PDF?
flashcards.back: PMF is for discrete variables (sum), PDF is for continuous variables (integral).

flashcards.front: What property must a PDF satisfy?
flashcards.back: Total area under curve = 1, and f(x) ≥ 0 for all x.
Value of CDF at 0.5: F(0.5) = P(X ≤ 0.5)
PMF - gives probability at exact points

flashcards.front: How to get CDF from PDF?
flashcards.back: Integrate PDF from -∞ to x: F(x) = ∫_{-∞}^x f(t)dt

flashcards.front: Example use of PMF in CS?

flashcards.back: PDF: smooth curve, PMF: vertical lines/bars

flashcards.front: When to use Dirac delta in PDF?
flashcards.back: For mixed distributions with discrete components
